entryType: direct entry into living space without dedicated foyer
kitchenLocation: northwest corner with linear galley layout, adjacent to dining area
bedroomLayout: single bedroom located in northeast corner, separated from main living area
bathroomPlacement: single full bathroom centrally located between bedroom and living areas
efficiencyNotes: galley kitchen maximizes counter and storage space
linear circulation minimizes wasted hallway space
open dining/living area creates sense of spaciousness
uniqueFeatures: angled entry door creates interesting geometric flow
bedroom positioned for privacy from main living areas
compact but complete kitchen with full appliance suite including dishwasher
dimensionNotes: 20' x 23' overall footprint efficiently utilizes every square foot with appropriately scaled rooms for ADU living - bedroom is generous for the unit size, kitchen is compact but functional, and open living/dining maximizes perceived space
